app.title: LiveMux
app.exiftoolError: ExifTool not found. Please install ExifTool and restart the app.
app.ffmpegWarning: FFmpeg not found. iPhone MOV videos will not be remuxed to MP4, which may cause playback issues on Google Photos. Install FFmpeg for best compatibility.

mux.title: Single Mux
mux.overwriteDesc: Replace the original image file with the motion photo
mux.deleteVideoDesc: Remove the video file after muxing
mux.keepTempDesc: Do not delete intermediate XMP sidecar files
mux.skipXmpDesc: Do not embed XMP metadata (faster, less compatible)

batch.title: Batch Directory
batch.exifMatchDesc: Match image-video pairs by EXIF metadata instead of filename
batch.incrementalDesc: Skip files that already contain motion photo data
batch.copyUnmuxedDesc: Copy images without a matching video to output directory
batch.overwriteDesc: Replace existing files in the output directory
batch.deleteVideosDesc: Remove source video files after muxing
batch.noPairs: No image/video pairs found in this directory

adb.title: ADB Push
adb.noFiles: No image files found in this directory
